name: The Bunker Latham
about: The Bunker is an indoor golf and social lounge venue that uses TrackMan technology to provide a realistic golfing experience. It features a full bar, food menu, and a sports bar atmosphere, making it suitable for both golfers and non-golfers. The venue is designed for casual play, practice, private events, and group outings. Hourly bay rentals are available, and the cost can be split among up to 8 people per bay, with recommended time allocations of 30 minutes per person for 9 holes and one hour for 18 holes. PGA professionals are on-site for coaching and lessons.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses premium TrackMan technology, the same system used by PGA professionals
Can accommodate up to 8 people in a single bay, making it great for group outings
Offers PGA professional coaching for players of all skill levels
Combines a realistic golf simulator experience with a full-service sports bar and food menu
Provides an immersive environment with a global golf experience on multiple simulated courses

food_and_drink.notes: Full food menu and light food menu available at various locations; catering services also provided.
Full bar service available; indoor/outdoor bar options at some locations; happy hour offered.

simulator_hardware.notes: Multiple bays use TrackMan technology, with varying bay counts per location (5, 6, 7, 8).

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides golf equipment, but players are welcome to bring their own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted; The Bunker has a full bar and food menu available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The recommended time is one hour per person for a full 18 holes, or 30 minutes per person for 9 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The Bunker does not have specific information about kid-friendly features or age restrictions; it is primarily an adult-oriented sports bar and lounge environment.
